name: io.github.gblinproject/gblin-mcp-server
description: Treasury standard for AI agents on Base mainnet. Lets autonomous agents hold capital in GBLIN — a diversified, Crash-Shield-protected on-chain index — and Just-In-Time swap to USDC the millisecond they need to pay an x402 invoice. GBLIN_V5 is owned by a 48h Timelock Controller for verifiable trust.

environmentVariables.name: GBLIN_RPC_URL
environmentVariables.description: Optional. Base mainnet RPC URL (Alchemy, QuickNode, etc). Defaults to https://base-rpc.publicnode.com.
